subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou seest me supplicating the heaven of Thy bounty and the daystar of Thy grace, detached from all Thy servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی ترانی مقبلاً الی سمآء عطائک و شمس فضلک و منقطعاً عن عبادک و خلقک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @law of Huququ'llah, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
